arts.ttl: Athletic Club release Nico Williams statement amid Arsenal summer transfer talk
arts.sum: Contributing two goals and one assist to Spain's Euro 2024-winning antics last summer, 22-year-old Williams found himself tied in rumours to Europe's elite clubs including the Gunners . Athletic Club have announced an untimely groin injury for Arsenal-linked attacker Nico Williams, saying that the extent 'is pending'.

arts.ttl: William Saliba names his childhood dream club
arts.sum: Arsenal defender William Saliba names the club he has always dreamed of playing for.

arts.ttl: John McGinn makes Kieran Tierney feelings clear on Celtic return as Aston Villa hero convinced of one thing
arts.sum: The Hoops diehard is on his way back to his boyhood heroes this summer after penning a pre-contract deal from the Gunners

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Whether Nico Williams actually wants to sign for Arsenal or Barcelona after talks with Andrea Berta
Arsenal 'suffer major transfer blow' as top forward target Nico Williams drops hint over his future
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao attacker Nico Williams - linked with Arsenal and Barcelona - suggests that he wants to spend at least one more season at San Mames.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target Nico Williams clears his future with Champions League ambition
arts.sum: Arsenal’s chances of signing Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams have been dealt a major blow. The Spaniard, who was part of Spain’s Euro 2024 winning team last year, has caught the attention of Arsenal and some other big clubs with his consistent performances for his club and country. arts.ttl: Forget Zubimendi: Arsenal Have ‘Generational’ Ace Ready to Replace £310k-p/w Duo
arts.sum: Arsenal have a busy transfer window ahead but they could save millions with a star who is already in their ranks

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres issues transfer message amid Arsenal interest
arts.sum: The Sweden international has emerged as a key transfer target for the Gunners following the appointment of Andrea Berta as their new sporting director and Arsenal are expected to intensify their pursuit of the 26-year-old over the next few weeks. However, the former are currently his most likely destination as Arteta pushes to bring Gyokeres to the Emirates Stadium amid his pursuit of a prolific new centre forward.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery might have just helped Arsenal sign £60m striker this summer - opinion

arts.ttl: “3 players in one” – Pundit’s nonsensical criticism of Arsenal star has journalist hitting back
arts.sum: Rafael van der Vaart is no stranger to irking people with his brazen approach to punditry. The former Tottenham and Ajax man’s words during the half-time of Real Madrid’s 2-1 defeat to Arsenal annoyed Voetbal International reporter Süleyman Öztürk.
